# appLevelRequirement

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

CRUD operations for AppLevelRequirement records via csdk CLI

## Usage

```bash
csdk app-level-requirement list
csdk app-level-requirement get --id <value>
csdk app-level-requirement create --name <value> --level <value> --descriptionTrgmSimilarity <value> --searchScore <value> [--description <value>] [--requiredCount <value>] [--priority <value>]
csdk app-level-requirement update --id <value> [--name <value>] [--level <value>] [--description <value>] [--requiredCount <value>] [--priority <value>] [--descriptionTrgmSimilarity <value>] [--searchScore <value>]
csdk app-level-requirement delete --id <value>
```

## Examples

### List all appLevelRequirement records

```bash
csdk app-level-requirement list
```

### Create a appLevelRequirement

```bash
csdk app-level-requirement create --name <value> --level <value> --descriptionTrgmSimilarity <value> --searchScore <value> [--description <value>] [--requiredCount <value>] [--priority <value>]
```

### Get a appLevelRequirement by id

```bash
csdk app-level-requirement get --id <value>
```
